# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

parameters:
  appName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: mywebapp
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: East US

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Web/sites
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: "[parameters('appName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', concat(parameters('appName'), '-plan'))]"
    siteConfig:
      appSettings:
      - name: WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION
        value: "18"

- type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-plan')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    sku:
      name: S1
      tier: Standard
      size: S1
      capacity: 1
      family: S
      level: Standard

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01-preview
  name: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-sql')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    administratorLogin: adminuser
    administratorLoginPassword: "Password123!"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01-preview
  name: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-sql/', parameters('appName'), '-db')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    edition: Basic
    maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
    requestedServiceObjectiveName: Basic

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: 2021-04-01
  name: "[concat(parameters('appName'), 'storage')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    accountType: Standard_LRS
  kind: Storage

- type: Microsoft.Web/sites/config
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: "[concat(parameters('appName'), '/web')]"
  dependsOn:
  - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
  properties:
    appSettings:
    - name: DATABASE_CONNECTION_STRING
      value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', concat(parameters('appName'), '-sql'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('appName'), '-db;Persist Security Info=False;User ID=adminuser;Password=Password123!;MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
